subject: [PATCH v3 1/2] x86/tdx: Fix off-by-one in port I/O handling

reviews.author: Edgecombe, Rick P
reviews.summary: Applied the Reviewed-by tag without commenting on the patch's technical merits.

2026-05-27.patch_summary: The patch fixes an off-by-one error in the port I/O handling code for TDX (Trusted Execution Environment) on x86 architecture. The issue arises from the use of GENMASK macro, which includes one extra bit when calculating the mask size. This causes incorrect results for certain I/O operations. The fix adjusts the calculation to exclude the last bit.
